review_comment:
warning: function 'Dn' is within a recursive call chain [[misc-no-recursion](https://clang.llvm.org/extra/clang-tidy/checks/misc/no-recursion.html)]
```cpp
  static int Dn(int i, int j, int n)
             ^
```
<details>
<summary>Additional context</summary>

**src/render/dithering_matrix.h:66:** example recursive call chain, starting from function 'Dn'
```cpp
  static int Dn(int i, int j, int n)
             ^
```
**src/render/dithering_matrix.h:73:** Frame #1: function 'Dn' calls function 'Dn' here:
```cpp
    return +4 * Dn(i % (n / 2), j % (n / 2), n / 2) + Dn(i / (n / 2), j / (n / 2), 2);
                ^
```
**src/render/dithering_matrix.h:73:** ... which was the starting point of the recursive call chain; there may be other cycles
```cpp
    return +4 * Dn(i % (n / 2), j % (n / 2), n / 2) + Dn(i / (n / 2), j / (n / 2), 2);
                ^
```

</details>

warning: use of undeclared identifier 'ASSERT' [clang-diagnostic-error]
```cpp
    ASSERT(i >= 0 && i < n);
    ^
```

warning: use of undeclared identifier 'ASSERT' [clang-diagnostic-error]
```cpp
    ASSERT(j >= 0 && j < n);
    ^
```
